Costura.ExcludeAssemblies: Aveva.PI.IdentityModel OSIsoft.AF.Analysis.AnalysisRule.AnalysisSQC OSIsoft.AF.Analysis.AnalysisRule.AnalysisTimeTrue OSIsoft.AF.Analysis.AnalysisRule.EventFrame OSIsoft.AF.Analysis.AnalysisRule.Imbalance OSIsoft.AF.Analysis.AnalysisRule.PerformanceEquation OSIsoft.AF.Analysis.AnalysisRule.Rollup OSIsoft.AF.Asset.DataReference.Analysis OSIsoft.AF.Asset.DataReference.Formula OSIsoft.AF.Asset.DataReference.PIPoint OSIsoft.AF.Asset.DataReference.StringBuilder OSIsoft.AF.Asset.DataReference.TableLookup OSIsoft.AF.Time.TimeRule.Event OSIsoft.AF.Time.TimeRule.OR OSIsoft.AF.Time.TimeRule.Periodic OSIsoft.AFSDK OSIsoft.PI.Configuration OSIsoft.PI.Configuration.PISDKRegDirectoryProvider OSIsoft.PI.Net OSIsoft.PI.Resources OSIsoft.PIAnalytics.PerformanceEquation
